# Contract

## Contract Filter

Use '--type filter' to get contract filters details
- filter name and tenant
- properties
    - Ethernet Type
    - IP Protocol
    - match only fragments
    - stateful
    - source range
    - destination range
    - TCP rules
- filter usage (standard and taboo contracts)

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_contract.filter:iserver.output.default
```
